title: Virotia vieillardii
taxonomy: Virotia vieillardii is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and is an endemic species. The classification of Virotia vieillardii places it within the order Malpighiales, which is a large order of flowering plants. This order is further divided into several suborders and families, with Violaceae being one of them. The classification of Virotia vieillardii provides valuable information about its evolutionary relationships and taxonomic position.
